title: World leaders welcome U.S.-Iran deal as Europe signals sanctions relief, urges Hormuz reopening
summary: The United States and Iran have reached an agreement following more than three months of negotiations and military conflict that began in late February. The deal has prompted responses from world leaders and Europe, with sanctions relief being discussed. This resolution is significant as the months-long hostilities had disrupted global energy and commodities markets.
content: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.

zh.title: 世界领导人欢迎美伊协议，欧洲暗示解除制裁并敦促霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗在经过三个多月的谈判和从2月底开始的军事冲突后达成协议。该协议引发了世界领导人和欧洲的回应，并讨论了制裁解除问题。这一解决方案意义重大，因为数月的敌对行动扰乱了全球能源和商品市场。

title: Oil prices slide after Pakistan announces deal between US and Iran
summary: Oil prices have declined following an announcement of a peace agreement between the United States and Iran, which includes reopening the key Strait of Hormuz waterway. The deal, announced by U.S. President Donald Trump, brings relief to global energy markets that had been disrupted by the conflict.
content: Under the agreement, the key Strait of Hormuz waterway will be reopened, US President Donald Trump said.

zh.title: 巴基斯坦宣布美伊协议后油价下滑
zh.summary: 在美伊和平协议宣布后油价下跌，该协议包括重新开放关键的霍尔木兹海峡水道。由美国总统特朗普宣布的该协议为因冲突而受扰乱的全球能源市场带来了缓解。

title: Stock futures jump, oil prices fall as Trump says U.S. has reached peace deal with Iran
summary: President Donald Trump announced that the United States has reached a peace deal with Iran, ending months of hostilities that had shut the Strait of Hormuz and triggered a global oil shock. The announcement prompted stock-index futures to surge while oil prices fell, signaling market optimism about economic recovery.
content: Oil prices fell and U.S. stock-index futures jumped Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. has agreed to a peace deal with Iran, apparently ending months of hostilities that shut the Strait of Hormuz and sent the global economy into an oil shock.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成和平协议，股指期货上升油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布美国与伊朗达成和平协议，结束了数月的敌对行动，这些行动导致霍尔木兹海峡关闭并引发全球油价冲击。该宣布促使股指期货飙升，油价下跌，表明市场对经济复苏的乐观情绪。

title: Stock futures jump after the U.S. and Iran reach a deal to end the war: Live updates
summary: The United States and Iran have reached an agreement to end their ongoing conflict. This development comes as the three major U.S. stock indexes are posting gains following a winning week.
content: The three major indexes are coming off a winning week.

zh.title: 美伊达成结束战争协议后股指期货上涨：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗已达成协议结束其持续的冲突。在经过成功的一周后，三大美股指数正在上涨。
